title: Mutants and Zombies
description: This mod adds new Mutant and Zombie mobs.
body:
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1204883?logo=curseforge&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=orange&color=242424)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mutants-and-zombies) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/mutants-and-zombies?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=18ED49&color=242424)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutants-and-zombies) [![Supported Versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1204883(4F21AC).svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mutants-and-zombies) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388544059114786907?style=flat&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=&labelColor=blue)](https://discord.gg/rSVp3nCpPx) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-75D5E3?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D71EVQVC)

This mod adds new Mutant and Zombie mobs to the game. It is an official reforge of the mod [Ryan's Zombies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ryans-zombies). All models were created and provided by the user "Nice_Try_Boi".

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2df362f3e56b298b772dd8a638ec914e8f74f61_0.webp)
![Rotten Mutant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28aaf63d22f7970dc163f3211c100014f63f57c8_0.webp)

The following mobs are available so far:

- **Zombie Brute** - very lange and very strong tank like zombie (ID: ```mutantszombies:zombie_brute```)
- **Crawler** - small, fast, has the ability to climb (ID: ```mutantszombies:crawler```)
- **Spitter** - shots with slime balls (ID: ```mutantszombies:spitter```)
- **Blister Zombie** - a faster, stronger zombie (ID: ```mutantszombies:blister_zombie```)
- **Split Head Zombie** - a faster, stronger zombie (ID: ```mutantszombies:split_head_zombie```)
- **Mutant Brute** - very lange and very strong tank like mutant (ID: ```mutantszombies:mutant_brute```)
- **Rotten Mutant** - taller, stronger and slower than a Zombie (ID: ```mutantszombies:rotten_mutant```)

## Configuration

This mod offers a simple config to enable/disable natural spawning. 

**Forge** - The config file is stored per world:

```minecraft/saves/[NAME_OF_YOUR_WORLD]/serverconfig/mutantszombies-server.toml```
    

**NeoForge** - The config file is stored per Minecraft installation / instance: 

```minecraft/config/mutantszombies-server.toml```
   

**Fabric** - The config file is stored per Minecraft installation / instance:

```minecraft/config/mutantszombies.json5```
